MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Sojourn Properties, Inc. is present. Represented by Karen Fout.
Attorney David Brillant appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Gerard Simons is present.
Attorney Sean Bockover representing the defendant through limited scope.

Judge Quidachay, litigants and counsel confer privately in chambers for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated.
